zh.East Bergholt, Babergh district, Suffolk: 英國英格蘭素福爾可易亞斯特 波爾特
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Burrough於1510年出生在英國素福爾可易亞斯特 波爾特時，他的父親Christopher Burrough21歲，母親Anna Dorthea Cardinale16歲。他於1532年與Elizabeth Neville在英國英格蘭素福爾可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1577年4月10日之前在他的家鄉，埋葬在英國素可維斯特布恩。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Burrough于1510年出生在英国素福爾可易亞斯特 波爾特时，他的父亲Christopher Burrough21岁，母亲Anna Dorthea Cardinale16岁。他于1532年与Elizabeth Neville在英国英格兰素福爾可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1577年4月10日之前在他的家乡，埋葬在英国素可維斯特布恩。

nameMeanings.name: Burrough
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Burrow
meanings: topographic name for someone who lived by a castle or manor house, or in a town, especially a chartered town or borough (Middle English burgh, Old English burg ‘fortified place, borough, manor’), or a habitational name for someone who came from a place so named because it was a fortified town or near an ancient fort, such as Burrow (Leicestershire, Lancashire), Burrough Green (Cambridgeshire), Brough (numerous counties), and Peterborough (Northamptonshire); see also Burgh .

topographic name for someone who lived on a hill or near a mound (Middle English bergh, Old English beorg), or a habitational name for someone who came from a place so named, such as Burrow (Devon, Somerset). Middle English bergh became throughly confused with burgh in 1 above. Compare Burrough .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When John Burrough was born in 1510, in East Bergholt, Suffolk, England, his father, Christopher Burrough, was 21 and his mother, Anna Dorthea Cardinale, was 16. He married Elizabeth Neville in 1532, in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died before 10 April 1577, in his hometown, and was buried in Westbourne, Sussex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Burrough est né en 1510, à East Bergholt, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Christopher Burrough, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Anna Dorthea Cardinale, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Neville en 1532, à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé avant 10 avril 1577, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Westbourne, Sussex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Burrough 1510 in East Bergholt, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Christopher Burrough 21 und seine Mutter Anna Dorthea Cardinale 16. Er hat 1532 in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Neville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb vor 10. April 1577 in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Westbourne, Sussex, England begraben.

Lui sposato Elizabeth Neville nel 1532, nel Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì prima del 10 aprile 1577, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a Westbourne, Sussex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Burroughが1510年にイギリススフォルクエアスト バーグホルトで生まれた時，父Christopher Burroughは21歳，母Anna Dorthea Cardinaleは16歳であった。1532年にイギリスイギリススフォルクでElizabeth Nevilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1577年4月10日以前に故郷で死去し，イギリススセックスウエストボウルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Burrough(이)가 1510년 영국 수폴크 이스트 버고트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Christopher Burrough(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Anna Dorthea Cardinale(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1532년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에서 Elizabeth Neville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1577년 4월 10일 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 수세스 웨스트보우른에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Burrough nasceu em 1510, em East Bergholt, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Christopher Burrough, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Anna Dorthea Cardinale, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Neville em 1532, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu antes 10 de abril de 1577, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em Westbourne, Sussex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Burrough родился в 1510 г. в местности эаст бирголт, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Christopher Burrough было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Anna Dorthea Cardinale, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Neville в 1532 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер перед 10 апрель 1577 г. в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности вестбурн, суссекс, Англия.
